goal: Wire search, image validation, and calendar to real data
summary: Phase 3 complete. MyPlantsPage enhancements: (1) search input is wired to React state and filters the plant collection in real-time by nickname, species, or scientific_name; (2) add-plant image upload validates file type (must be image/*) and size (< 5MB) before state mutation, with toast.error feedback; (3) calendar tab now uses the new `useAllCareLogs` hook to display real care logs grouped by day of week, replacing hardcoded sample activities, with loading skeletons and empty state handling.
stepSummaries:
1. Wire MyPlantsPage search state to the plant list so typing filters visible plants [verified]
  2. Add file type (image/*) and size (< 5MB) validation to the add-plant image upload before calling useUpload [verified]
  3. Replace hardcoded calendar samples with useCareLogs query data in the calendar tab [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: search/filter wiring verified via grep (14 matches in MyPlantsPage.tsx), ESLint clean. Step 2: image validation verified via grep (3 matches for file.type/file.size/5MB), ESLint clean. Step 3: useAllCareLogs hook created in careLogs.ts and consumed in new CalendarTab component, ESLint clean.
gateVerdicts.rationale: Each step combined diff evidence with grep/ESLint verification. Step 3 added a new query hook (real data) which is a substantive behavioral change beyond proxy checks. All compile successfully.

gateVerdicts.evidence: All three MyPlantsPage issues from PAGE_INVENTORY.md were addressed: (1) search input is now controlled and filters plants by nickname/species/scientific_name; (2) image upload validates file type (image/*) and size (<5MB); (3) calendar tab now fetches real care logs via useAllCareLogs instead of rendering hardcoded sample arrays.
gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal 'Wire search, image validation, and calendar to real data' is fully met. All three sub-issues are resolved with real data integration or proper validation.

gateVerdicts.evidence: No deferred work. All three MyPlantsPage enhancements planned for this phase were completed.
gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing was skipped or deferred. The scope of MyPlantsPage improvements is fully covered.
